title: Add missing podman commands
body:
podman container cleanup&Refresh
podman pod (Create,rm, ps)

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: LGTM
LGTM (I assume podman-port is desired as well)
@rh-atomic-bot r+

:pushpin: Commit 49f30ac has been approved by `vrothberg`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=vrothberg 49f30acdb47d44c173ab8d44d03a2f32728a7e7e -->
:hourglass: Testing commit 49f30ac with merge e6bfa1f...
:broken_heart: Test failed - [status-papr](https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/projectatomic/libpod/e6bfa1f0893c1a315b97de11703c5f66dea64773.1531769557010173696/index.html)
I think Homu is in bad shape. It's reporting the results of the key=value PR here...
Merging manually.
Or... Wait, did it merge key=value without a DCO?

> FAIL - does not have a valid DCO

@mheon, do you know what that means?
@vrothberg A Signed-off-by line in the commit - `git commit -s`. It seems like Homu merged a commit which didn't have one, and is now complaining on subsequent PRs?
@mheon, looks like commit ea5fad6c8b35d73f6cc16642bc56f428954aa36e causes it
#1105 should fix
@rhatdan once #1105 goes in can you rebase and remove the makefile change so we can merge?
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably dc25b21) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
Test issues.  Also should there be some updates to transefer.md too?

Transfer.md is a good call, it has a section for commands not in Docker.

Though honestly, we might want to leave cleanup and refresh out of there. I don't see these commands ever being used by users - `cleanup` should be invoked exclusively by Podman itself, `refresh` by packagers (and maaaaybe to try and isolate bugs). Adding more commands might muddy the waters, so to speak.
